supersedes_grid: contextual_physics_v1: [0.1, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0, 5.0] (ADR-042 found structurally too tight -- root cause: rate-per-100-flight-hours budget projected onto a single ~0.5-1h flight window yields <4% expected recall at V=5.0 regardless of model quality)

east_north_velocity_residual.detector: adsb.cusum causal two-sided Page CUSUM (ADR-029, UNCHANGED from v1)
east_north_velocity_residual.h_selection: derived per budget_grid point from natural calibration, NOT set in this file

note_on_persistence_v2_cumulative: v1'deki 'persistence' modu (window_s=30.0 sabit kayan pencere) yerine, adsb/models/contextual_persistence_v2.py'nin conformal_p_value uzerinde ucus-sinirlariyla resetlenen kumulatif istatistigi kullanilir -- ADR-042'nin CUSUM'un neden daha iyi genelledigi gozlemine dogrudan yanit.
revision_policy: Mode ASSIGNMENT per channel may be revised only via a new pre-registered version informed by the anomaly-development role; budget shares, grid values, and persistence_v2 parameters may not be changed post-hoc within this namespace.
